docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,800.00 FILED BY JIMENEZ, FELIPE AS TO DEFENDANT SUAZO, JUAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-16-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE IN OPEN COURT TODAY. PLAINTIFF DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR HIS CASE TODAY. PLAINTIFF MUST SERVE DEFENDANT WITH THE CLAIM PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: AMANDA FISCHER. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-27-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MUST BRING HIS OWN INTERPRETER AT THE NEXT HEARING. PLAINTIFF DID NOT BRING AN INTERPRETER FOR TODAYS HEARING AND THERE WAS NO PROOF OF FILED IN THIS CASE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-27-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-27-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---LAURA HAGUIRRE.DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---JUAN CARLOS SUAZO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2013 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIMENEZ, FELIPE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SUAZO, JUAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
